themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "בֶּֽעָפָֽר׃: it with dust - dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 13 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: בֶּֽעָפָֽר׃: it with dust - dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud

themes.label: Holiness

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "To the end that the children of Israel may bring their sacrifices, which they offer in the op...". Word-study detail reinforces "שְׁלָמִ֛ים: them for peace - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".
